FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
Need Help? We’ve Got Answers.

items.item_title: How do I submit my property?
Is listing a property really free?
How long does it take to get my property approved?
Can I feature my property listing?

settings.editor: You can easily submit your property through our user dashboard. Simply create an account, click on “Add Property”, fill in the required details, upload images, and submit for review.

elements.htmlCache: You can easily submit your property through our user dashboard. Simply create an account, click on “Add Property”, fill in the required details, upload images, and submit for review.

settings.editor: Yes, basic property listings can be free depending on your plan. We also offer premium packages that provide additional features like featured listings and higher visibility.

elements.htmlCache: Yes, basic property listings can be free depending on your plan. We also offer premium packages that provide additional features like featured listings and higher visibility.

settings.editor: Property approval typically takes between 24 to 48 hours. Our team reviews each submission to ensure quality and accuracy before publishing.

elements.htmlCache: Property approval typically takes between 24 to 48 hours. Our team reviews each submission to ensure quality and accuracy before publishing.

settings.editor: Yes, you can upgrade your listing to a featured property. Featured listings appear in highlighted sections of the website, helping you gain more visibility and attract more potential buyers.

elements.htmlCache: Yes, you can upgrade your listing to a featured property. Featured listings appear in highlighted sections of the website, helping you gain more visibility and attract more potential buyers.
